transcript:
Speaker A (AI): ನಿನಗೆ ಎಷ್ಟು ಸಹೋದರರಿದ್ದಾರೆ? [How many brothers do you have?] 
Speaker B (Human): I having two brothers. 
Speaker A (AI): "having" ಅಲ್ಲ... ಈಗ ಇಬ್ಬರನ್ನೂ ಕೈಯಲ್ಲಿ ಹಿಡಿದಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? ಏನು? ಹೀಗೆ ಹೇಳು - I have two brothers. [Not "having"... are you holding both of them in your hand now? What? Say it like this - I have two brothers.] 
Speaker B (Human): ಓಹ್... ಸರಿ ಸರಿ. ನನಗೆ English ಸರಿಯಾಗಿ ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English properly.] 
Speaker A (AI): ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ, AI Teacher ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [No problem, have you tried AI Teacher?] 
Speaker B (Human): ಅದೆಲ್ಲ ತುಂಬಾ costly ಇರುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That must be very costly, right?] 
Speaker A (AI): ಅಷ್ಟೇನೂ ಇಲ್ಲ! normal English classes ಗಿಂತ 7 ಪಟ್ಟು ಚೀಪ್ ಇದೆ. ಅದಕ್ಕೆ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನರು MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ English practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] 
Speaker B (Human): ಆದರೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] 
Speaker A (AI): ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಸಾಕು. ತುಂಬಾ confident ಆಗ್ತೀರಾ. [Just 15 minutes of practice a day is enough. You will become very confident.] 
Speaker B (Human): ವಾವ್! ಹೇಗೆ join ಮಾಡೋದು? [Wow! How to join?] 
Speaker A (AI): ಕೆಳಗಿರೋ install ಬಟನ್ ಒತ್ತಿ MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ. sign up ಮಾಡಿ practice start ಮಾಡಿ. ಕೇವಲ 15 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮಗೆ improvement ಕಾಣಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತೆ. ಬನ್ನಿ ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ! [Click the install button below and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will see improvement in just 15 days. Come, start now!] 
Speaker A (AI): Click on install now and download MySivi app.

summary: The ad features a split-screen conversation in Kannada where an AI robot corrects a woman's English grammar mistake. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable and convenient solution used by over 1 crore people. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app for visible improvement in 15 days.
